unresolved_task_required_findings.summary: Explicit-provider rejection still depends on unrelated alternate-provider probes in /chat and codebase_question.
unresolved_task_required_findings.reason: The repair spans multiple provider-selection entrypoints and changes a selected-provider execution contract across both REST and MCP surfaces, so it is safer to task up than batch as a minor inline fix.

unresolved_task_required_findings.summary: Copilot seed import accepts symlinked runtime artifacts from the seed directory.
unresolved_task_required_findings.reason: This is a trusted-runtime path-boundary issue in the Copilot seed importer and is not low-risk enough for the minor inline path.

unresolved_task_required_findings.summary: MCP follow-up retries lack a replay barrier or caller-supplied idempotency key.
unresolved_task_required_findings.reason: Fixing this requires adding or redefining a caller-visible replay or idempotency contract on codebase_question, which is outside the allowed minor-batchable surface.
